title: Copy and paste multiple Timeline items
excerpt: Can we please add the ability to highlight multiple cells in the Timeline column and be able to copy+paste them into other groups? Right now we can highlight and copy/paste a single cell, but if we could select multiple …

posts.author: aholling (Amanda Holling)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can we please add the ability to highlight multiple cells in the Timeline column and be able to copy+paste them into other groups? Right now we can highlight and copy/paste a single cell, but if we could select multiple Timeline cells and paste that into other Groups that would save us a ton of time and efficiency.

Thanks,
Amanda
